allow: Bash(rm -f verify.mjs verify-mp.mjs shot-menu.png shot-game.png shot-mp.png vite-dev.log server.log)

Bash(ls -la "C:/Users/admin/.claude/projects/d--temp-frag-protocol-fps/memory/" 2>/dev/null && echo "---MEMORY.md---" && cat "C:/Users/admin/.claude/projects/d--temp-frag-protocol-fps/memory/MEMORY.md" 2>/dev/null || echo "no memory dir/file yet")

PowerShell(try { $p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5177 -State Listen -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; "Stopped dev server PID $p on :5177" } } catch { "No listener on :5177" })

PowerShell(try { $p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5180 -State Listen -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; "Stopped dev server PID $p on :5180" } } catch { "No listener on :5180" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4178 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Expand OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; "preview stopped")
